displayNameZh: 游戏引擎六大能力展示
summary: Yt Engine Abilities component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「游戏引擎六大能力展示」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-engine-abilities/src/YtEngineAbilities.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtEngineAbilities` and `ytEngineAbilitiesDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Engine Abilities Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-engine-abilities to my project. Preserve the exported YtEngineAbilitiesProps API and register the YtEngineAbilities composition with the default props.
